code:
import io

fn factorial(_ n: Int) -> Int
  if n <= 1
    1
  else
    n * factorial(n - 1)
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    match parse::<Int>(line)
    when Some(n)
      let r = factorial(n)
      println("#{n}!=#{r}")
    when None
      println("invalid input")
    end
  when None
    println("no input")
  end
end
